caption: The video captures a scene from a legislative assembly, likely during a session addressing the JUSUN strike. The setting is a formal chamber with green seats, some of which have "DO NOT SIT" signs placed on them, indicating social distancing measures. Several individuals, dressed in traditional and formal attire, are seated and wearing face masks, suggesting adherence to health protocols. One person in the foreground appears to be reading from a document, possibly delivering a speech or statement. The atmosphere seems serious and focused, as the representatives urge the federal government to ensure a speedy resolution to the ongoing strike. The news ticker at the bottom of the screen reinforces the context of the discussion, highlighting the urgency of the matter.
